snippet: Dear Mrs. Worms, Good afternoon. Please find attached the completed form from my side with the meter readings, as well as photos of the meters. If you need any additional information, please let me
subject: Meter readings and completed form
body:
Dear Mrs. Worms,

Good afternoon.

Please find attached the completed form from my side with the meter
readings, as well as photos of the meters.

If you need any additional information, please let me know.

Thank you in advance.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov
